tool_calls:
set -e
if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  jq -r '(["name","department","salary"] | @csv), (.[] | [.name, .department, .salary] | @csv)' /data/employees.json | sed 's/^"name","department","salary"$/name,department,salary/' > /data/employees.csv
else
  echo 'jq is required but not installed' >&2
  exit 1
fi
cat /data/employees.csv

tool_outputs.commands:
set -e
if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  jq -r '(["name","department","salary"] | @csv), (.[] | [.name, .department, .salary] | @csv)' /data/employees.json | sed 's/^"name","department","salary"$/name,department,salary/' > /data/employees.csv
else
  echo 'jq is required but not installed' >&2
  exit 1
fi
cat /data/employees.csv
